examples.turkish: Ek olarak, güvenli erişim için koridora geçici aydınlatma kurulmuştur.

examples.english: In addition, the contractor must submit the updated test report before energization.
examples.turkish: Ek olarak, yüklenici enerji vermeden önce güncellenmiş test raporunu sunmalıdır.

badExampleEnglish: In addition to, the contractor must submit the updated test report.
badExampleTurkishExplanation: In addition tek başına cümle başında ek bilgi verir; “in addition to” sonrasında isim veya -ing yapı gelir.
correctedExampleEnglish: In addition, the contractor must submit the updated test report.
commonMistakes: In addition ve in addition to yapılarını karıştırmak.
taskPromptTemplate: Add an additional action or requirement to an email or report using “In addition”.
minimumUserOutput: In addition, the contractor must submit the updated test report before energization.
masteryCriteria: User can add extra information in formal engineering emails or reports using “in addition” and avoid confusing it with “in addition to + noun”.
notes: B2 profesyonel mühendislik iletişimi için kritik yapı. QC: prerequisite corrected from self-reference during earlier pass. Final needs-review resolution: classified as discourse_marker / professional_pattern; examples improved for engineering report/email context.

title: In Conclusion
explanation: Report conclusion, executive summary closing and meeting response summary.
turkishExplanation: Bir rapor, değerlendirme veya toplantı cevabının sonunda sonuç bildirir. Yeni kanıtsız bilgi eklemek yerine önceki bulguları toparlamalıdır.
engineeringUseCase: Report conclusion, executive summary closing and meeting response summary.

examples.english: In conclusion, the installation can proceed after the listed QA/QC comments are closed.
examples.turkish: Sonuç olarak, listelenen QA/QC yorumları kapatıldıktan sonra montaj ilerleyebilir.

examples.english: In conclusion, the remaining risk is manageable if additional monitoring is maintained during commissioning.
examples.turkish: Sonuç olarak, devreye alma sırasında ek izleme sürdürülürse kalan risk yönetilebilir düzeydedir.

examples.english: In conclusion, the proposed sequence is acceptable provided that the final inspection record is approved.
examples.turkish: Sonuç olarak, nihai denetim kaydı onaylanırsa önerilen sıralama kabul edilebilir.

badExampleEnglish: In conclusion the installation can proceed after the QA/QC comments are closed.
badExampleTurkishExplanation: In conclusion cümle başında kullanıldığında ardından virgül gelir ve sonuç önceki bulgulara dayanmalıdır.
correctedExampleEnglish: In conclusion, the installation can proceed after the QA/QC comments are closed.
commonMistakes: In conclusion sonrası virgül koymamak veya sonuç cümlesinde yeni ve kanıtsız bilgi eklemek.
taskPromptTemplate: Write a final report conclusion using “In conclusion” based on the given engineering findings.
minimumUserOutput: In conclusion, the installation can proceed after the listed QA/QC comments are closed.
masteryCriteria: User can use “in conclusion” to summarize a report or meeting response without introducing unsupported new information.
notes: B2 profesyonel mühendislik iletişimi için kritik yapı. QC: useful item, but historically held for review because it is a discourse marker rather than pure grammar. Final needs-review resolution: classified as discourse_marker / professional_pattern; examples improved for engineering report/email context.
